name: omokawa-skills
description: Plan-driven development workflow for Claude Code: AC definition, MECE plan review, finalization, and design/quality/UI review with sub-agent fan-out. Includes career-bucket skill (translate-to-vision-story) and engineering-bucket skill (dry-ssot-text).

plugins.name: omokawa-skills
plugins.description: 13 skills (define-acceptance-criteria, mece-plan-review, finalize-plan, review-design, review-code-quality, polish-before-commit, model-data, map-user-stories, qa-ui, create-jira-issues, set-jira-story-points, translate-to-vision-story, dry-ssot-text), 1 command (/create-pr), and 4 agents (review-design, review-code-quality, finalize-plan, polish-before-commit) for plan-driven development, career storytelling, and AI-generated text refactoring.
